name: Hokkaido Coca-Cola Bottling Co.,Ltd.
summary: Hokkaido Coca-Cola Bottling Co.,Ltd. manufactures and sells soft drinks in Hokkaido, Japan. The company was incorporated in 1940 and is headquartered in Sapporo, Japan. Hokkaido Coca-Cola Bottling Co.,Ltd. is a subsidiary of Dai Nippon Printing Co., Ltd.
